calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Stephanie Colombo Plaintiff/Respondent in Pro Per.
Javin Lynch-Perry Defendant/Appellant in Pro Per.

Parties are sworn.

Defendant/Appellant testifies on his own behalf.
Plaintiff /Respondent testifies on her own behalf.

The Court declares a brief recess.
Upon return from the recess, the Court discusses the law cited by Defendant/Appellant, Perry.

Parties discuss additional details of the case.

At the close of the hearing, the Court rules as follows:

The Court affirms the judgment.

Judge: Garrett L. Wong, Clerk: K. Septien, Not reported, (504).

SMALL CLAIMS APPEAL NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE
Off Calendar Sep-12-2024 Set For Trial On Sep-12-24 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 504
